outputs.review.json:
{
  "parameters": [
    {
      "paramcd": "ACTOT",
      "param": "ADAS-Cog Total Score",
      "description": "Total score from the Alzheimer's Disease Assessment Scale-Cognitive Subscale",
      "type": "score",
      "range": "0-70",
      "scoring_rule": "Sum of individual item scores (ACITM01-ACITM11). Higher scores indicate greater cognitive impairment."
    },
    {
      "paramcd": "ACITM01",
      "param": "Word Recall Task",
      "description": "Ability to recall words",
      "type": "item",
      "range": "0-5",
      "scoring_rule": "Number of errors in recalling words. 0 = best performance, 5 = worst performance."
    },
    {
      "paramcd": "ACITM02",
      "param": "Commands",
      "description": "Ability to follow simple commands",
      "type": "item",
      "range": "0-5",
      "scoring_rule": "Number of errors in following commands. 0 = best performance, 5 = worst performance."
    },
    {
      "paramcd": "ACITM03",
      "param": "Constructional Praxis",
      "description": "Ability to copy geometric figures",
      "type": "item",
      "range": "0-5",
      "scoring_rule": "Number of errors in copying figures. 0 = best performance, 5 = worst performance."
    },
    {
      "paramcd": "ACITM04",
      "param": "Delayed Word Recall",
      "description": "Ability to recall words after a delay",
      "type": "item",
      "range": "0-5",
      "scoring_rule": "Number of errors in delayed recall. 0 = best performance, 5 = worst performance."
    },
    {
      "paramcd": "ACITM05",
      "param": "Naming Objects and Fingers",
      "description": "Ability to name objects and fingers",
      "type": "item",
      "range": "0-5",
      "scoring_rule": "Number of errors in naming. 0 = best performance, 5 = worst performance."
    },
    {
      "paramcd": "ACITM06",
      "param": "Ideational Praxis",
      "description": "Ability to perform a sequence of actions",
      "type": "item",
      "range": "0-5",
      "scoring_rule": "Number of errors in performing actions. 0 = best performance, 5 = worst performance."
    },
    {
      "paramcd": "ACITM07",
      "param": "Orientation",
      "description": "Ability to orient to person, place, and time",
      "type": "item",
      "range": "0-8",
      "scoring_rule": "Number of errors in orientation. 0 = best performance, 8 = worst performance."
    },
    {
      "paramcd": "ACITM08",
      "param": "Word Recognition",
      "description": "Ability to recognize words",
      "type": "item",
      "range": "0-5",
      "scoring_rule": "Number of errors in word recognition. 0 = best performance, 5 = worst performance."
    },
    {
      "paramcd": "ACITM09",
      "param": "Remembering Test Instructions",
      "description": "Ability to remember test instructions",
      "type": "item",
      "range": "0-5",
      "scoring_rule": "Number of errors in remembering instructions. 0 = best performance, 5 = worst performance."
    },
    {
      "paramcd": "ACITM10",
      "param": "Spoken Language",
      "description": "Ability to use spoken language",
      "type": "item",
      "range": "0-5",
      "scoring_rule": "Number of errors in spoken language. 0 = best performance, 5 = worst performance."
    },
    {
      "paramcd": "ACITM11",
      "param": "Word Finding",
      "description": "Ability to find words",
      "type": "item",
      "range": "0-5",
      "scoring_rule": "Number of errors in word finding. 0 = best performance, 5 = worst performance."
    }
  ]
}
